document.title: Usability Engineering Plan; Usability Engineering Report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Controlled usability engineering plan and report forms revised on 2024.04.01. to align with KGMP, ISO 13485, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and EU MDR Article 10 requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports usability engineering planning and reporting within the quality system procedure set.
keyPoints: Document No 705-1 is the Usability Engineering Plan with Rev. No 0 and revision date 2024.04.01.
Document No 705-2 is the Usability Engineering Report with Rev. No 0 and revision date 2024.04.01.
Revision reason states complete revision in accordance with KGMP, ISO 13485:2016, EN ISO 13485:2016+A11:2021, FDA 21 CFR Part 820, and MDR (EU) 2017/745 Article 10 requirements.
